observations.axis: Weight of Emotional Burden vs. Relief
observations.summary: The narrative contrasts the oppressive, suffocating weight of the father's slow collapse with the gradual lifting of that weight, allowing the son to breathe more freely.

left_evidence.quote: The weight that had been pressing on his chest for seven years—the terrible, suffocating weight of his father's slow collapse

right_evidence.quote: began to lift. Not all at once. Not completely. But enough that he could take a full breath without feeling like he was stealing air from someone who needed it more.

bridge_evidence.quote: Not all at once. Not completely. But enough that he could take a full breath
